overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, starting in a neon-lit indoor corridor and emerging onto a waterfront with panoramic views of a futuristic skyline filled with holographic advertisements. The player character walks along wet wooden docks through a shanty-town area toward a denser urban street, showcasing the atmospheric neon-drenched environment of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit indoor corridor with arcade machines

events.description: exits narrow indoor corridor through doorway into open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor lined with neon arcade machines and exiting through a wooden doorway

entered.detail: large cyan neon arrow sign pointing right, mounted on the ceiling
traditional-style red paper lantern hanging near the exit
retro-style arcade game cabinet with glowing screen
dark wooden doorway leading to the outside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a narrow corridor illuminated by cyan neon signs and red paper lanterns. The player walks past an arcade machine toward a wooden doorway, transitioning from the enclosed indoor space to the open waterfront outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with panoramic city skyline view

events.description: emerges from indoor neon lighting to open night sky with city glow

agents.ego_description: walking along wet wooden dock planks toward the city skyline, observing the holographic billboards

entered.detail: futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements
massive building covered in glowing holographic advertisements including a pink face
wet wooden walkway reflecting the neon lights from the city
raised highway or monorail track silhouetted against the city lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building reveals a breathtaking waterfront view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape. The player walks along wet wooden docks as massive holographic billboards illuminate the night sky, with an elevated highway visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront shanty town with industrial structures

events.description: gradually turns right, shifting the city skyline from center to left of frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront walkway, passing makeshift wooden structures while the city skyline remains visible to the left

entered.detail: small makeshift wooden structure with corrugated metal roof
cluster of improvised buildings and containers along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking along the waterfront, passing through a shanty-town area with makeshift wooden structures on the right. The city skyline shifts to the left as the path curves, with the elevated highway now crossing the center of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront area with storage containers

events.description: moves from open waterfront into more enclosed industrial area with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: navigating through an industrial area with shipping containers and parked vehicles, approaching street level

entered.detail: large white shipping container or truck trailer blocking part of the path
several parked vehicles along the right side of the path
tall street light illuminating the area with warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The path leads into a more industrial zone featuring a large white container truck on the left and parked cars on the right. The ground transitions from wooden planks to dirt and gravel as the player approaches street level, with street lamps providing additional lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial buildings and ramp entrance

events.description: begins ascending a concrete ramp leading up to a building entrance
approaches group of NPCs standing near a building with bright red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp toward a building entrance, passing by pedestrians near a neon-lit storefront

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the building entrance with red neon lights

entered.detail: concrete ramp leading upward to a higher street level
building facade illuminated with bright red neon signage and Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player ascending a concrete ramp into a denser urban area with commercial buildings. A group of NPCs stands near a building entrance illuminated by bright red neon lights. The environment transitions from industrial waterfront to active urban street with parked cars and pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic neon corridor into a sprawling, industrial cyberpunk waterfront and finally into a dense urban street. It begins inside a narrow hallway lit by cyan signs and red lanterns, moving past an arcade machine before passing through a wooden doorway into the open night air. As the camera emerges, the view expands to reveal a breathtaking cityscape of holographic billboards and an elevated highway, with the path leading along wet wooden docks and through a shanty-town of makeshift structures. The scene then shifts toward an industrial zone where the wooden planks give way to dirt and gravel, passing a large white container truck and parked cars under the glow of street lamps. Finally, the camera ascends a concrete ramp, leaving the waterfront behind to enter a bustling commercial district characterized by bright red neon lights and groups of pedestrians.
